tasks.description: Add cascade failure detection to orchestrator
tasks.context: Implement failure detection in orchestrator that catches when task execution silently fails. Add logging at each execution stage (task received, agent assigned, execution started, completion confirmed). File: apps/agents/src/orchestrator/index.ts. Add checkpoints that log task state transitions and detect 30s+ execution stalls.

tasks.description: Implement retry logic for failed task executions
tasks.context: Add exponential backoff retry (3 attempts max, 5s/10s/20s delays) when task execution fails. If all retries exhausted, mark task as failed and log full context. File: apps/agents/src/orchestrator/task-executor.ts. Include retry counter in task metadata.

Create health check endpoint that reports orchestrator metrics: tasks pending, in-progress, completed, failed, avg execution time. File: apps/agents/src/health/orchestrator-health.ts. Expose metrics that CEO bot can query to verify execution rate.

tasks.description: Fix silent task skip in agent router
tasks.context: Audit agent routing logic to find why tasks are skipped without error logging. File: apps/agents/src/orchestrator/agent-router.ts. Ensure all code paths either execute task or throw explicit error. Add validation that agent exists before assignment.

tasks.description: Add CEO bot integration for execution rate alerts
tasks.context: Integrate orchestrator health metrics with CEO bot to send Telegram alerts when execution rate drops below 80%. File: backend/src/telegram/ceoBot.ts. Poll health endpoint every 5min and alert on sustained low execution rate.

Add 2-minute timeout per task with automatic failure and cleanup. File: apps/agents/src/orchestrator/task-executor.ts. Use Promise.race with timeout to prevent infinite hangs. Log timeout events distinctly from failures.

Create tests for cascade failure recovery: simulate agent crashes, network timeouts, malformed tasks. File: apps/agents/tests/orchestrator/resilience.test.ts. Verify retry logic, timeout handling, and error propagation work correctly.
